headline: Avery Dennison (AVY) Stock Looks Reasonable On Earnings But Weak On Returns
summary: Avery Dennison stock has delivered a decline of 13.7% over the past five years, yet the broader valuation checks currently lean supportive rather than stretched. This sets up a clear question about whether the recent share price still offers value or simply reflects its fundamentals fairly. Over the past five years, shareholders are down 13.7%, which suggests the stock has not rewarded long term holders despite its current valuation support. Upcoming earnings commentary on packaging...
